title: Duty
content:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Duty thatן¿½s to say, complying,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ With whateן¿½erן¿½s expected here;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ On your unknown cousinן¿½s dying,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Straight be ready with the tear;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Upon etiquette relying,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Unto usage nought denying,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Lend your waist to be embraced,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Blush not even, never fear;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Claims of kith and kin connection,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Claims of manners honour still,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Ready money of affection
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Pay, whoever drew the bill.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ With the form conforming duly,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Senseless what it meaneth truly,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Go to church the world require you,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ To balls the world require you too,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ And marry papa and mamma desire you,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ And your sisters and schoolfellows do.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Duty ן¿½tis to take on trust
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ What things are good, and right, and just;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ And whether indeed they be or be not,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Try not, test not, feel not, see not:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Tis walk and dance, sit down and rise
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ By leading, opening neן¿½er your eyes;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Stunt sturdy limbs that Nature gave,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ And be drawn in a Bath chair along to the grave.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Tis the stern and prompt suppressing,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ As an obvious deadly sin,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ All the questing and the guessing
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Of the souls own soul within:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Tis the coward acquiescence
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ In a destinyן¿½s behest,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ To a shade by terror made,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Sacrificing, aye, the essence
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Of all thatן¿½s truest, noblest, best:
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ ן¿½Tis the blind non-recognition
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Or of goodness, truth, or beauty,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Save by precept and submission;
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Moral blank, and moral void,
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Life at very birth destroyed.
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Atrophy, exinanition!
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Duty!
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Yea, by dutyן¿½s prime condition
ֲ ֲ ֲ ֲ Pure nonentity of duty!
meaning:
"Duty" is a quintessential example of Arthur Hugh Clough's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
